alkylation reagent: alkylation was performed with addition of 4 µl of 500 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: addition of 4 µl of 500 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: 0.5 µg of sequencing-grade modified trypsin (Promega) was added
collision energy: setting quadrupole isolation width to 1.4 Th and normalized collision energy to 34%
instrument: using a Q Exactive HF hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
labeling: Both tissue and Silk-Ovarioid samples were labeled with TMT-10plex
reduction reagent: adding 3.5 µl of 250 mM dithiothreitol (Sigma Aldrich)
